_COMMENTS.MAX_WATERMARK_LENGTH: Length limitation of the encoded payload string.
_COMMENTS.BITS_PER_CHAR: Mathematical bits ceiling required per character based on CHARSET.
_COMMENTS.BCH_T: Maximum correctable bit errors initialized by the BCH instance.
_COMMENTS.DATA_BYTES: Real volume requirement to house watermark data payload.
_COMMENTS.ECC_BYTES: Reserved byte volume allocated for Error Correction.
